name: Chronicle 2.0
tagline: AI-assisted presentation builder that skips the generic filler and keeps your ideas sharp.
problem: Generic AI presentation tools churn out bloated, templated slides that dilute a speaker's actual message. Chronicle 2.0 gives teams a smarter way to build decks that look considered and communicate clearly without the cookie-cutter AI output. It targets professionals who need polished presentations fast but refuse to sacrifice quality or voice.
useCases: Building investor pitch decks that feel crafted rather than auto-generated
Creating client-facing proposals with a consistent, branded visual style
Producing internal strategy presentations with clear narrative structure
Turning rough talking points into structured slide decks for sales teams
